# Inspiration - Marloth: A Child’s Fairytale World

Monsters: Wicked rulers (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Wicked%20rulers%201fe9ce4060e04133a4ce24cbe8054c4a.md), Zombies (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Zombies%20901eef0e94024304bb9512fee842e3b3.md), Curses (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Curses%208d8f367d6fdd47a580868227f4274a51.md)
Plot is driven by MC desire: True
Story scale: Full story (../Story%20scales/Full%20story%20faaea9bcaf0f43b5ae79dfa06b96be34.md)
Traversal reasons: Ad-hoc (../Traversal%20reasons/Ad-hoc%207aba7cb9db9b4d489a197336498c62dd.md), Quest (../Traversal%20reasons/Quest%20a4f61ad2283b441ea7492e1afb41160f.md)
Traversal types: Stationary (../Traversal%20types/Stationary%2019344185392b46c7bd17f5017474cc1d.md), Journey (../Traversal%20types/Journey%2049dd89633f684d91a8d2ed2cd9bdf09e.md)
Type: Book (../Inspiration%20types/Book%20e76b1047e9d44c01a00ccdeea97cd346.md)

<aside>
💡

This is only in Inspirations to add weight to some of the stats.

I don’t want this attached to motivations/features because it creates a feedback loop which skews the data.
